creator: fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar
text:
On Mon, Feb 23, 2009 at 5:20 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of biology/p5-bioperl,
>
> Please note that PR ports/131989 has just been submitted.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/131989

Edwin,

I (the maintainer) have submitted the PR myself. But because FreeBSD
keeps silently ignoring emails sent from my FreeBSD boxes
(@unsam.edu.ar) I had to use my gmail address to send the PRs.



-- 
fernan
